recommendations.description: An array of quality check recommendations (each typed via Recommendation.qualityCheckType, e.g. "Billing" or "Clinical"). This will be an empty list if there are no recommendations.

description.example: Missing CPT modifier for bilateral procedure.

reason.example: Bilateral chest X-ray performed but only unilateral code submitted.

provenance.description: Identifies the list of sections in the report that were used to generate this recommendation.

referenceResources.description: This array contains a list of various types of resource like website url, pdf document name, chat prompt, etc. that helps understand the recommendation.

additionalInfo.description: A dictionary of name and value. It is used for partners to send any additional information regarding their recommendations.

Provenance.description: Identifies a section in the report that was used to generate a recommendation.

text.description: The section of the actual report text associated with this recommendation.

startPosition.description: The offset within the report text that marks the start of the section that was used to generate this recommendation.

endPosition.description: The offset within the report text that marks the end of the section that was used to generate this recommendation.

ReferenceResource.description: A reference resource that helps understand the recommendation.

type.description: The type of reference resource (e.g., website url, pdf document name, chat prompt).

content.description: The content of the reference resource.
